query: UPDATE subscriptions SET plan = 'starter' WHERE plan = 'pro'; UPDATE subscriptions SET plan = 'business' WHERE plan = 'agency'; ALTER TABLE subscriptions MODIFY COLUMN plan ENUM('free', 'starter', 'business', 'corp') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free';
